Title: Cold-Pressed Coconut Oil - Extra Virgin & Full Wooden Extraction 1L
Original_Description:
This bottle of Bliss Tree Cold Pressed Coconut oil to retain valuable nutrients and flavor that you will not find in refined oil, making it good for your heart and your overall well being. It is 100% chemical free, unrefined, unbleached and pure. Interestingly, this oil has lauric acid (which only found in human breast milk) that fights against harmful pathogens and makes the body strong.
What's unique about Bliss Tree Cold-Pressed Oils?
We always use high-quality raw materials to extract oils. Most importantly, the machines used are entirely made of wood i.e., both Ulakkai (upper rod) and Ural (bottom cylinder) made out of country wood. No stone or stainless parts are used. This ensures the temperature of the oil doesn't exceed 50 degree celsius, keeping the oil truly "wooden cold-pressed" while retaining all essential nutrients and flavor are retained. Moreover, the suspended particles are removed by natural sedimentation i.e., let the oil sit under the sun for about 4 days allowing the suspended particles to settle down at the bottom and manually collect the oil from the top. That's the reason we cannot produce this oil in large quantities and also for the translucent look rather than being transparent.
Ingredients: Coconuts
Allergen_Advice:
ce:
﻿This product was processed in a facility that also processes wheat, milk, peanuts, sesame seeds and tree nuts.

Title: Cold-Pressed Peanut Oil - Extra Virgin, Full Wooden Extraction 1L
Original_Description:
This bottle of Bliss Tree Cold Pressed Peanut oil is just filled with nutritional value and health benefits.  It is low in saturated fats, free from cholesterol, and contains Omega-3 fatty acids and antioxidants. Its high smoke point makes it ideal for use in deep-frying. This oil is good for your heart and your overall well-being.
What's unique about Bliss Tree Cold-Pressed Oils?
We always use high-quality raw materials to extract oils. Most importantly, the machines used are entirely made of wood i.e.,
both Ulakkai (upper rod) and Ural (bottom cylinder) made out of country wood. No stone or stainless parts are used. This ensures the temperature of the oil doesn't exceed 50 degree Celsius, keeping the oil truly "wooden cold-pressed" while retaining all essential nutrients and flavor are retained. Moreover, the suspended particles are removed by natural sedimentation i.e., let the oil sit under the sun for about 4 days allowing the suspended particles to settle down at the bottom and manually collect the oil from the top. That's the reason we cannot produce this oil in large quantities and also for the translucent look rather than being transparent.

Title: Black Kuruvai Rice (Karung Kuruvai Arisi)
Original_Description:
At Bliss Tree, we are proud to offer Black Kuruvai Rice (Karung Kuruvai Arisi), an ancient rice variety known for its health benefits and rich nutritional content. Grown traditionally, this rice is a powerhouse of antioxidants, dietary fiber, and essential nutrients, making it an excellent choice for those who prioritize wellness and a balanced diet.
The deep, dark color of Black Kuruvai Rice comes from its high anthocyanin content, which provides strong antioxidant properties that help protect the body from oxidative stress. This rice variety is also rich in fiber, supporting digestive health, and is known to have anti-inflammatory benefits, making it a great addition to a healthy lifestyle.
Perfect for various dishes like rice bowls, porridge, or even traditional South Indian meals, Karung Kuruvai Arisi offers a distinct flavor and texture that enhances the nutritional value of your meals. Whether you're aiming to boost your immunity or simply enjoy a wholesome, unprocessed grain, Black Kuruvai Rice is an ideal option.
Key Benefits of Black Kuruvai Rice (Karung Kuruvai Arisi):
High in antioxidants, particularly anthocyanins
Promotes digestive health with high fiber content
Helps boost immunity and overall well-being
Choose Bliss Tree's Black Kuruvai Rice for a naturally nutritious and flavorful addition to your meals. Embrace the traditional goodness and experience the health benefits of this superfood today!
Ingredients:
Black Kuruvai Rice
Suggested Recipe - Black Kuruvai Rice Dosa
Wash & soak 2 cups black kuruvai rice for 12 hours
Grind with 1 cup chopped coconut to make coarse batter
Transfer batter to a bowl
Add salt and little oil and mix well
Make dosa in a tawa with this batter

Title: Forest Elephant Rice (Kaattu Yaanam Arisi)
Original_Description:
At Bliss Tree, we offer you the unique and nutrient-dense Forest Elephant Rice (Kaattu Yaanam Arisi), a traditional rice variety known for its exceptional health benefits. This rice is grown in select regions, prized for its rich nutrient profile, making it a staple for those who seek both taste and nutrition in their meals.
Forest Elephant Rice is naturally high in dietary fiber, vitamins, and essential minerals.  Ideal for a wide range of dishes, from steamed rice to biryani and everything in between, Kaattu Yaanam Arisi is a versatile ingredient that supports a balanced diet.
This variety of rice is not only about flavor and nutrition; it also supports sustainable and eco-friendly farming methods. By choosing Bliss Tree’s Forest Elephant Rice, you're ensuring a meal that's wholesome and supports traditional agricultural practices.
Key Benefits of Forest Elephant Rice:
Rich in dietary fiber and essential nutrients
Supports digestive health and boosts energy levels
Grown using eco-friendly, sustainable farming methods
Ideal for a variety of nutritious meals
Experience the rich, earthy taste of Bliss Tree’s Forest Elephant Rice and enjoy the health benefits it brings to your family’s table.
Ingredients:
Kaattu Yaanam Rice
Suggested Recipe - Kaattu Yaanam Rice Idly/Dosa
Soak 2 cups kaattu yaanam rice and 2 cups idly rice for 6 hours
Separately soak 1 cup urad dal and 3 tbsp fenugreek seeds
Grind all ingredients in a grinder and add salt as required
Transfer to a bowl and let it ferment for about 8 hours
Make dosa in a tawa or idly with this batter

Title: Black Rice (Karuppu Kavuni Arisi)
Original_Description:
Black rice, also known as Karuppu Kavuni Arisi in Tamil, is an ancient grain celebrated for its numerous health benefits and striking dark purple-black color. This nutrient-dense rice is packed with antioxidants, particularly anthocyanins, which give it its unique hue and help protect the body from oxidative stress.
Traditionally consumed by royalty in ancient times, black rice has earned the nickname "forbidden rice" due to its rarity and high value. Today, it is prized for its rich nutritional profile, including high fiber content, protein, and essential vitamins and minerals like iron and vitamin E. It is also gluten-free, making it a great choice for those with gluten sensitivities.
Health Benefits of Black Rice (
Karuppu Kavuni Arisi
):
Rich in Antioxidants
: The anthocyanins in black rice have powerful anti-inflammatory properties.
Supports Heart Health
: It helps lower cholesterol levels and improve heart function.
Aids Digestion
: The high fiber content promotes a healthy digestive system.
Helps in Weight Management
: Low in calories and high in nutrition, black rice can support weight management goals.
Whether used in savory dishes, desserts, or as a side, Kavuni Arisi is a versatile ingredient that adds not just flavor but a wealth of health benefits to your meals. Enjoy it in porridges, biryanis, or even as a nutritious alternative to white rice.
Experience the goodness of Black Rice and elevate your health with every bite!
Ingredients:
Kavuni Arisi
Suggested Recipe - Black Rice Idly/Dosa
Mix 2 cups black rice, 3/4 cup urad dal, 2 cup idly rice and handful of rice flakes (poha)
Soak the mixed ingredients for 6 hours
Grind well in a grinder and add salt as required
Transfer to a bowl and let it ferment for about 8 hours
Make dosa or idly with this batter

Title: Hand Pound Rice (Kaikuthal Arisi)
Original_Description:
At Bliss Tree, we offer Hand Pound Rice (Kaikuthal Arisi), a traditional rice variety known for its rich nutrients and natural flavor.
The traditional hand pounding process ensures the grain's integrity, providing a wholesome and nutritious option for daily meals. With its rich texture and robust flavor, Hand Pound Rice is perfect for a variety of dishes like biryani, pulao, or simply as steamed rice, enhancing both taste and nutrition.
Choosing Bliss Tree’s Hand Pound Rice means embracing a healthier lifestyle and supporting sustainable, age-old agricultural methods. It is free from artificial processing, giving you the authentic goodness of rice as nature intended.
Key Benefits of Hand Pound Rice (Kaikuthal Arisi):
Retains natural fiber and essential nutrients
Enhances digestion and boosts overall health
Preserves traditional hand-pounding methods
No artificial polishing or processing
Enjoy the authentic taste of tradition and the health benefits of natural rice with Bliss Tree’s Hand Pound Rice. A nutritious choice for your family!
Ingredients: Hand Pound Rice
Recipes:
Wash 1 cup hand pound rice in running water
Soak the rice for 6-8 hours
In a pressure cooker, add 2 cups water and the rice
Cook in low flame for two whistles
Once pressure settles down, rice is ready to be served with your favorite curry

Title: Foxtail Millet
Original_Description:
Bliss Tree Raw Foxtail Millets are considered as the perfect substitute for the healthy diets. Foxtail millet is rich in dietary fibre, protein and low in fat. Unlike rice, foxtail millet releases glucose steadily without affecting the metabolism of the body. The incidence of diabetes is rare among the population which consumes foxtail millet diet.
What's unique about Bliss Tree millets?
At Bliss Tree, we use electronic sorting machines to remove stones and dirt from our grains. Though, our products are not certified by any institution for medicinal use, several people use millets for health reasons. So, we keep our millets free of preservatives or anti-caking agents which would increase shelf life to few years but those chemicals might hinder your body from absorbing the nutrients.
Ingredients: Foxtail Millet
Allergen_Advice:
ce:
This product was processed in a facility that also processes wheat, milk, peanuts, sesame seeds and tree nuts.
Recipes:
1.
Foxtail Millet Vangi Bath
by Sushma, Illinois.
2.
Foxtail Millet Sweet Pongal
by Lakshmipriya, New Jersey.

Title: Red Rice (Sigappu Arisi)
Original_Description:
At Bliss Tree, we offer the premium Red Rice (Sigappu Arisi), a traditional rice variety cherished for its distinctive flavor and rich nutrient content. Known for its reddish hue, this unpolished rice retains its outer bran, ensuring higher fiber, vitamins, and minerals compared to polished rice varieties.
Red Rice is a great source of antioxidants, which promote heart health and reduce inflammation. Its nutty flavor and chewy texture make it a versatile choice for a wide range of dishes, from curries to salads and rice bowls. Whether you're preparing biryani or a simple stir-fry, Sigappu Arisi provides a wholesome, delicious base for your meals.
Key Benefits of Red Rice (Sigappu Arisi):
Rich in dietary fiber, vitamins, and minerals
Supports heart health and digestion
Retains natural nutrients
Experience the authentic taste and health benefits of Bliss Tree Red Rice (Sigappu Arisi) and bring the richness of tradition to your kitchen!
Ingredients:
Red Rice
Suggested Recipe - Red Rice Idly/Dosa
Soak 2 cups red rice and 2 cups idly rice for 6 hours
Separately soak 1 cup urad dal and 3 tbsp fenugreek seeds
Grind all ingredients in a grinder and add salt as required
Transfer to a bowl and let it ferment for about 8 hours
Make dosa in a tawa or idly with this batter

Title: Finger Millet
Original_Description:
Bliss Tree Finger Millet
Finger Millet, also known as Ragi, is a small but nutrient-dense grain cherished for its impressive health benefits. Naturally gluten-free and high in calcium, this ancient grain is an excellent choice for those seeking a healthier lifestyle. One of its standout properties is its highly alkaline nature, making it a soothing remedy for reducing acidity in the body.
Why Choose Bliss Tree Finger Millet?
At Bliss Tree, we prioritize quality and purity. Our Finger Millet undergoes meticulous cleaning using advanced electronic sorting machines to ensure it is free from stones, dirt, and other impurities. We avoid adding any preservatives or anti-caking agents to maintain the millet's natural integrity, even if it means a shorter shelf life. This ensures that you get a product that's as close to nature as possible, allowing your body to absorb its rich nutrients effectively.
Health Benefits of Finger Millet
Naturally gluten-free and ideal for those with gluten intolerance.
Rich in calcium, iron, and dietary fiber for stronger bones and better digestion.
Its alkaline properties help combat acidity and promote gut health.
Packed with antioxidants that support overall well-being.
Whether you're making traditional recipes or experimenting with modern dishes, Bliss Tree Finger Millet is the perfect addition to your pantry. Experience the goodness of nature in every grain.

Title: Bridegroom Samba Rice (Maapillai Samba Arisi)
Original_Description:
Maapillai Samba Rice, also known as Bridegroom Rice, is a traditional variety with a rich history and incredible health benefits. Named after the Tamil word "Maapillai," which means groom, this rice is believed to boost strength and stamina, hence being served to grooms before their wedding.
At Bliss Tree, our Bridegroom Samba Rice is naturally cultivated, ensuring that you get the purest form of this ancient grain. Packed with nutrients, including iron, vitamins, and fiber, this rice supports digestion, enhances immunity, and promotes energy. Its unique red hue and slightly coarse texture make it ideal for making traditional South Indian dishes like Pongal, Idli, and Dosai.
Embrace the power of tradition and choose Maapillai Samba Rice for a healthier, more energetic lifestyle. Add it to your daily diet and enjoy its earthy flavor and numerous health benefits.
Key Benefits of Maapillai Samba Rice:
Boosts stamina and physical strength
Rich in iron and antioxidants
Supports digestive health
Perfect for weight management
Improves immunity naturally
Shop now at Bliss Tree for 100% natural Maapillai Samba Rice and rediscover the health secrets of ancient grains.
Ingredients:
Maapillai Samba Rice.
Suggested Recipe - Maapillai Samba Payasam (Phirni)
Soak 1 cup maapillai samba rice for at least 4 hours
In a pressure cooker, cook the rice with 2 cups milk and 2 cups water for 4 whistles
Add Jaggery powder and boil for few mins
Add cardamom and cashews
Serve it hot or cold

Its unique red hue and slightly coarse texture prepare it ideal for making customary South Indian dishes like Pongal, Idli, and Dosai.
Embrace the power of tradition and choose Maapillai Samba Rice for a healthier, more energetic lifestyle. Named after the Tamil word "Maapillai," which means groom, this rice is believed to boost strength and stamina, hence being served to grooms before their wedding.
At Videeptha Foods, our Bridegroom Samba Rice is naturally cultivated, ensuring that you get the purest form of this ancient grain. Add it to your daily nourishment and appreciate its earthy aroma and numerous health benefits.
Key Benefits of Maapillai Samba Rice:
Boosts stamina and physical strength
Plentiful in iron and antioxidants
Supports digestive health
Flawless for weight management
Improves immunity naturally
Shop now at Videeptha Foods for 100% organic Maapillai Samba Rice and rediscover the health secrets of ancient grains.

Bring water to a rolling boil with a teaspoon of cooking oil and a pinch of salt.
Cook:

Drain the cooked pasta and rinse it under running water.
Sauté:
Stir-fry your favorite vegetables in a pan.
Combine & Enjoy:
Add the included Taste Maker Masala to the pan and mix in the cooked pasta. Toss well and serve hot!

Boil:

Cook:

Drain & Rinse:
Drain the cooked pasta and rinse it under running water.
Sauté:
Stir-fry your favorite vegetables in a pan.
Combine & Enjoy:
Add the included Taste Maker Masala to the pan and mix in the cooked pasta. Toss well and serve hot!

1. Rinse 100 gm Bliss Tree Kodo rava and cook with 3 parts of water in a cooker for 10 mins
2. Add Bliss Tree Jaggery to it and mix well
3. Add warmed milk, keep it in simmer and stir gently
4. Saute almonds, cashews & raisins in ghee
5. Mix sauteed nuts and raisins with the rava mixture and serve hot
Foxtail Millet Rava Kitchadi
1. Rinse & roast 100 gm Bliss Tree Foxtail Millet Rava
2. Heat ghee, add mustard seeds, urad dal & bengal gram dal
3. Add onions, green/red chili, curry leaves & coriander leaves.
4. Optional: Add carrot, beans, peas, tomatoes, salt & turmeric powder.
5. Saute, add water & cook 5-10 mins.
6. Add roasted rava & cook for 10 mins.
7. Mix well & serve hot.
Barnyard Millet Rava Laddu
1. Rinse 100g Bliss Tree Barnyard Millet Rava, 25g Moong dal & 25g Groundnut.
2. Dry roast and grind to powder.
3. Add fine Bliss Tree Jaggery Powder & cardamom powder.
4. Mix with Ghee and shape into Laddu.
Little Millet Rava Kesari
1. Rinse, roast & grind 100 gm Bliss Tree Little Millet Rava.
2. Simmer water, add ground rava & saffron (optional).
3. Stir in cardamom with it.
4. Add Bliss Tree Jaggery Powder and ghee to the mixture and keep stirring
5. Saute cashews & raisins in ghee, garnish it on the dish before serving.
Rewritten_Description:
Introducing the Millet Rava Combo! Vacuum-packed to retain freshness without any preservatives or additives, and part of the 2023 International Year of Millets - this 16lb pack is the flawless way to buy more and save more.
Package contains 2x2lb Kodo Millet Rava (Fine), 2x2lb Foxtail Millet Rava (Fine), 2x2lb Barnyard Millet Rava (Fine) & 2x2lb Little Millet Rava (Fine). Gluten free and straightforward to cook, this 8 pack can be used to produce many mouth-watering recipes like Phirni, Kitchadi, Laddu and Kesari. The flawless mix made from unpolished millets, clean of dirt, sand and stones. Total 8 packs & 16lb.

Title: Mutton Kulambu Masala - 200g
Ingredients:
Coriander, Cumin, Onion, Chilli, Fennel, Ginger, Turmeric, Garlic, Papine, Star Anise, Cinnamon & Salt
.
Allergen_Advice:
ce:
This product was processed in a facility that also processes wheat, milk, peanuts, sesame seeds, and tree nuts.
Recipes:
In a pressure cooker, add 100ml of cooking oil, then add in cleaned mutton pieces.
Mix in the required quantity of salt, ginger garlic paste, and water (until the top of all the mutton is covered) and cook for 5-6 whistles.
In a separate pan, after pouring in cooking oil, do seasoning with whole spices. Then add chopped onion, tomato then the cooked mutton.
Mix with the required amount of mutton curry masala, add some water and boil.
You may also add coconut paste to make the gravy thicker (optional).

What's unique about Bliss Tree millets?
At Bliss Tree, we use electronic sorting machines to remove stones and dirt from our grains. Though, our products are not certified by any institution for medicinal use, several people use millets for health reasons. So, we keep our millets free of preservatives or anti-caking agents which would increase shelf life to few years but those chemicals might hinder your body from absorbing the nutrients.

Title: Red Rice (Sivapu Arisi) - 10lb
Original_Description:
Naturally rich in dietry fiber and antioxidants, Bliss Tree's Bamboo Rice is the perfect choice for those who are worried about eating rice to avoid piling up those extra pounds. With our most advanced technology, we ensure that our Red Rice grain retains all its nutritious properties like antioxidants, phytonutrients and Vitamin E which, may otherwise be lost in the process.
Key Features:
Helps in controlling diabetes and can also prevent Asthma.
Has higher protein content than both rice and wheat.
Improves consumption of oxygen.
Reduces the risk of heart disease.
Ingredients: Red Rice
Allergen_Advice:
ce:
This product was processed in a facility that also processes wheat, milk, peanuts, sesame seeds and tree nuts.
Recipes:
Soak 2 cups red rice and 2 cups idly rice for 6 hours
Separately soak 1 cup urad dal and 3 tbsp fenugreek seeds
Grind all ingredients in a grinder and add salt as required
Transfer to a bowl and let it ferment for about 8 hours
Make dosa in a tawa or idly with this batter

Title: Millet Instant Mix Combo (10 pack, 42 servings)
Original_Description:
Package contains 10 packs total - 2 x 300g Millet Rava Dosa Mix, 2 x 300g Millet Pongal Mix, 2 x 300g Millet Chapathi Mix, 2 x 300g Millet Pakoda Mix and 2 x 300g Millet Biryani Mix
Millet Rava Dosa Ingredients:
﻿﻿Rava, Wheat, Kodo Millet, Little Millet, Barnyard Millet, Curry leaves, Green Chillies, Pepper and Salt.
Millet Pongal Ingredients:
Kodo Millet, Little Millet, Barnyard Millet, Foxtail Millet, Moong Dal, Pepper, Cumin, Curry Leaves, Ginger, Chilli, Asafoetida and Salt
Millet Chapathi Ingredients:
Wheat, Kodo Millet, Little Millet, Barnyard Millet, Finger Millet (Ragi), Pearl Millet (Bajri) and Salt
Millet Pakoda Ingredients:
Rice, Kodo Millet, Little Millet, Barnyard Millet, Gram Flour, Onion, Green Chillies, Carrot, Beans, Ginger, Garlic, Curry Leaves, Mint Leaves, Coriander, Asafoetida and Salt
Millet Biryani Ingredients:
﻿Kodo millet, Little millet, Mint leaves, Coriander leaves, Onion, Chilli, Spices and Salt.
Allergen_Advice:
ce:
﻿This product was processed in a facility that also processes wheat, milk, peanuts, sesame seeds and tree nuts.
Recipes:
s
Preparation Time 10 mins | Cooking Time 5 mins
Take Millet Rava Dosa Mix and add water to make the batter
Add coriander leaves and onion (optional)
Then keep the batter aside for 10 mins
Sprinkle the batter on a pan heated on medium flame to make crispy rava dosa
Serve hot with chutney and sambar
s
Preparation Time 5 mins | Cooking Time 10 mins
Take 1 cup of Millet Pongal Mix in a cooker
Add 4 cups of water into the cooker
Then pressure cook for 2-3 whistles
Add ghee, roasted cashews, raisins and mix well
Serve hot with chutney and sambar
s
Preparation Time 10 mins | Cooking Time 2 mins
Take Millet Chapathi Mix and add water to make the dough
Divide dough into small parts and roll each piece into a ball
Dust the ball with flour, then flatten it with a rolling pin
Cook it on a medium flame pan to get tasty & puffy chapathi
And serve hot with your favorite side dishes
s
Preparation Time 10 mins | Cooking Time 10 mins
Take Millet Pakoda Mix in a bowl
Slowly pour in water to form a thick paste
Heat oil and pour in a spoonful of  batter at a time
Deep fry for a few minutes and serve hot with your favorite chutney
s
Preparation Time 10 mins | Cooking Time 10 mins
Saute vegetables with ghee (can also use paneer, mushroom, meal maker or any meat)
Add 2 parts of water with 1 part of Bliss Tree Millet Biryani Mix and cook in a pressure cooker for 5 - 10 mins ( or 2 whistles)
Add lemon to taste and serve hot

s

Serve hot with chutney and sambar
s
Preparation Time 5 mins | Cooking Time 10 mins
Take 1 cup of Millet Pongal Mix in a cooker
Add 4 cups of water into the cooker
Then pressure cook for 2-3 whistles
Add ghee, roasted cashews, raisins and mix well
Serve hot with chutney and sambar

Title: Hand-Pound Ponni Parboiled Rice (Ponni Kaikuthal Arisi) - 2lb
Original_Description:
Hand-pounded rice is superior to fully polished rice in many ways. The bran is retained and because of the hand-pounding process, the rice tastes better. Bliss Tree's Hand Pound Rice is high in fiber and proteins. The glycemic index is low as compared to any other regular polished rice which makes it quite filling.
Key Features:
Controls Cholesterol
Good for Heart
Rich in Manganese
Ingredients: Hand Pound Rice
Allergen_Advice:
ce:
This product was processed in a facility that also processes wheat, milk, peanuts, sesame seeds, and tree nuts.
Recipes:
Wash 1 cup hand pound rice in running water
Soak the rice for 6-8 hours
In a pressure cooker, add 2 cups of water and the rice
Cook in low flame for two whistles
Once the pressure settles down, rice is ready to be served with your favorite curry

Title: Semi-polished Browntop Millet (Raw) - 2lb
Original_Description:
Bliss Tree Raw Browntop Millet has immense health which can be consumed as an alternative to rice by all age groups. Not any less than a wonder grain, Browntop Millet is nature’s gift to modern diet and sedentary activities that can lead to lifestyle disorders.
What's unique about Bliss Tree millets?
At Bliss Tree, we use electronic sorting machines to remove stones and dirt from our grains. Though our products are not certified by any institution for medicinal use, several people use millets for health reasons. So, we keep our millets free of preservatives or anti-caking agents which would increase shelf life to few years but those chemicals might hinder your body from absorbing the nutrients.
Key Features:
Low in calories
Rich in fiber
Low Glycemic Index
